Description.SunsettingFeatures2025Septem: These are the tools, features, or APIs that are currently scheduled to be sunset. You can learn more about what's happening and if it'll impact you by visiting the link next to each item below.{listStart}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Legacy Chat System is being sunset{boldEnd} - Starting November 30th, 2024, new experiences can not be created that use the legacy chat system. We’re updating our Community Standards 94 to require that creators use TextChatService, creators will have until April 30th, 2025 to migrate. You can read more on the {removingLegacyChatStart}DevForum post here{removingLegacyChatEnd} on how to transition to TextChatService. ({migrateToTextChatServiceLinkStart}Live{migrateToTextChatServiceLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Sunsetting support for Windows 7 and 8.1{boldEnd} - We are sunsetting support for Windows 7 and 8.1 in Studio in Early 2025. This means, in order to use Roblox Studio, you’ll need to upgrade to Windows 10 or higher. This is following a recent update to the Roblox app, where we announced with an in-app warning that we will remove support for Windows 7 and Windows 8.1 for the Roblox app by January 15, 2025. We’ll also be adding a similar warning to Studio and we’ll keep you updated on when support will be effectively discontinued. We will provide at least 30 days of notice prior to removing support. ({sunsettingStudioSupportLinkStart}Live{sunsettingStudioSupportLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Update to the GetFriendsOnlineAPI{boldEnd} - With the recent privacy changes that let users set their online status, we changed the GetFriendsOnline API to respect these settings. We recommend moving any referral system you use to PromptGameInvite. ({updateGetFriendsOnlineAPILinkStart}Live{updateGetFriendsOnlineAPILinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listEnd}
Description.StudioBugs2025SeptemberUpdat: Studio is a professional tool supporting long periods of sustained creation. We are investing heavily in both bug fixes and quality of life improvements that will make Studio more functional and reliable.{listStart}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Improve team create join time{boldEnd} - Start working on your experience, of any size, faster. (Live){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Script Diff Window {boldEnd} - Shipped in Package Diffs ({scriptDiffLinkStart}Live{scriptDiffLinkEnd}) and Scripts ({scriptDiffImprovementsLinkStart}Live{scriptDiffImprovementsLinkEnd}).{listItemEnd}{listEnd}
Description.CreateWorlds2025SeptemberUpd: {listItemStart}{boldStart}Store up to 8K image resolution{boldEnd} - Currently, when a user uploads an image > 1K in resolution, it gets transcoded down to 1K, and the high-fidelity version is lost. We will now start to store the high-fidelity version up to 8K. Initially, it will be used for asset previews in the Store. In the future, it can be utilized to support textures more than 1K. ({retainingHighFidelityImagesLinkStart}Live{retainingHighFidelityImagesLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Improved debuggability of the Physics system{boldEnd} - Improve the ability to debug physics in Studio by visualizing force/torques, overhauling the pause functionality ({physicsStepLinkStart}Live{physicsStepLinkEnd}), adding the ability to step through physics frames when paused ({stepPhysicsApiLinkStart}Live{stepPhysicsApiLinkEnd}), and adding the ability to temporarily simulate selected parts in edit mode. (Early 2026){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Improved physics solver{boldEnd} - New and improved physics solver that enables more complex mechanisms, improves overall physics performance, and makes existing mechanisms more robust. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Future Lighting Android Beta{boldEnd} - Future lighting model available as a beta feature on Android devices. ({futureOnAndroidStart}Live{futureOnAndroidEnd}){listItemEnd}

{listItemStart}{boldStart}Improvements to Fluid Dynamics{boldEnd} - Extend existing aerodynamic modeling to better simulate motion in water. (Early 2026){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}New voxel light grid{boldEnd} - Improvements to lighting to bring the highest quality option to as many devices as possible, including shadows, specular highlights, light reflection. (On hold){listItemEnd}

{listItemStart}{boldStart}Video API{boldEnd} - New video instances and APIs that intersect with and build off of the advanced Audio API, providing creators with more control over how they can utilize and display videos within their experiences. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Acoustic Simulation{boldEnd} - Automatically simulates how sound propagates through the environment, resulting in real-world behavior such as occlusion (muffling/blocking), reverb (echoing), and diffraction (bending around corners). This feature includes the ability to specify which sounds are included in the simulation, as well as how certain materials affect them. This feature will support sounds created with both the advanced audio API (wiring) as well as Sound instances. ({acousticSimulationLinkStart}Late 2025{acousticSimulationLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Range limit for lights{boldEnd} - Increase the range limit for lights to 120 studs. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Dragger improvements{boldEnd} - Improved controls, guides, and measurements for draggers. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}[New] Scalable Lightweight Interactive Models (SLIM) replaces Model Level of Detail system{boldEnd} - SLIM automatically composites your models and renders different LoDs for them. This can drastically reduce the number of triangles and draw counts required to render your models, which allows Harmony to dynamically scale down on lower-end devices and scale-up on higher-end devices. In the first release, SLIM will replace the existing Model Level of Detail system and will work with experiences that have instance streaming enabled. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}[New] 4k texture rendering{boldEnd} - With cloud transcoding, texture streaming, and Harmony, your textures can now be rendered at up to 4k resolution on client devices that have enough resources to support it. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}

{listItemStart}{boldStart}[New] Emissive maps{boldEnd} - An additional Surface Appearance map for emission. This will give you  higher fidelity control over parts of your object that should glow. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}[New] Enhanced voxel terrain{boldEnd} - Significantly increase scale, lower memory/storage requirements, and enhance mesh rendering for higher visual quality. (Mid 2026){listItemEnd}
Description.EngineExperience2025Septembe: {listItemStart}{boldStart}UI styling{boldEnd} - Stylesheets make it possible to change the look and feel of your UI with one click. ({introducingUiStylingLinkStart}Late 2025{introducingUiStylingLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Haptics 2.0{boldEnd} - Enhance the haptic feedback experience by implementing effect-based haptics, providing improved haptic effects out of the box, and enabling you to create custom waveforms. ({hapticsEffectsLinkStart}Live{hapticsEffectsLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Player script packages{boldEnd} - Player scripts will be put into a live-update package, which enables you to easily modify default camera and controls scripts and merge in the latest Roblox player script changes if they are forked. (Oh hold){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Avatar Settings{boldEnd} - Enhanced controls for player avatar size, collision, clothing and accessories to balance player identity with consistency and fairness in your experience. ({introducingAvatarSettingsLinkStart}Live{introducingAvatarSettingsLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}DataModel isolation and script capabilities - API Updates{boldEnd} - Add new features to DataModel Isolation and Script Capabilities to ensure all APIs are covered. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Instance streaming - multi replication focus{boldEnd} - For experiences with Instance Streaming enabled, this will allow you to designate multiple areas for streaming, and as a result for simulation as well. For example, you could set critical regions of your map that you frequently move players to such that they never stream out. ({newInstanceStreamingFeatureLinkStart}Live{newInstanceStreamingFeatureLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}

{listItemStart}{boldStart}Instance streaming - streaming excluded mode{boldEnd} - For experiences with Instance Streaming enabled, prevent replication of models to all clients. With this you'll not need to hide instances under the camera or the PlayerGUI anymore! (Early 2026){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Teleport tunnels (beta){boldEnd} - Create more immersive and larger experiences by enabling players to seamlessly travel through interactive tunnels (eg: bridge, long hallway, cave, etc) while teleporting between places. (Late 2026){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Universe navigation ‘Back’{boldEnd} - New default navigational UI to allow your players to navigate back to universes you previously teleported them to. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Native code generation (clients){boldEnd} - Native Code Generation is currently available on RCC and in Studio plugins. We are now exploring enabling Native Code Generation on additional platforms, including clients. (Oh hold){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Introducing PreferredInput API and Improved Touch Capabilities{boldEnd} - PreferredInput makes it easy to build cross-platform input behavior by exposing the primary input type available to a player, which is especially useful if they have multiple input devices available for use. Whether they’re on a gamepad, touchscreen, or keyboard, PreferredInput is your new go-to for handling button prompts and input labels, UI modes, and device-specific interactions. ({introducingPreferredInputLinkStart}Live{introducingPreferredInputLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Introducing ViewportDisplaySize API{boldEnd} - Query categories of the physical size of the screen Roblox is running on. This brings us closer toward developing universally, where developers build for different inputs & form factors rather than specific platforms for UI/UX. ({viewportDisplaySizeAPILinkStart}Late 2025{viewportDisplaySizeAPILinkEnd}){listItemEnd}

{listItemStart}{boldStart}Improvements to Gamepad Directional UI Selection{boldEnd} - Major improvements to default Gamepad Directional UI Selection so players can navigate all UIs using a Gamepad without developer lift. ({improvementsToGamepadUISelectionLinkStart}Live{improvementsToGamepadUISelectionLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}DragDetectors for UI{boldEnd} - Make UI in your experience draggable and interactive without scripting. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}UIStroke improvements: scaling, offsets, and more{boldEnd} - Improvements to UIStroke, including supporting scaling thickness, custom border alignment, and unlimited strokes. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Input Action System{boldEnd} - Platform agnostic, data-driven action map to streamline cross-platform development, making it easy for creators to write custom actions with better default inputs, while also providing a visual interface for customization. Now in {inputActionSystemBetaLinkStart}Beta{inputActionSystemBetaLinkEnd}. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}CSG on meshes{boldEnd} - Perform CSG (Constructive Solid Geometry) operations like Union, Intersect and Subtract on Meshes in Studio and in-experience. This will bring us one step closer to unifying all Digital Matter on the platform by bringing Parts and Meshes closer together. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Server authority (early access){boldEnd} - Early access to native support for Server Authority with Latency Compensation. If a Creator enables this feature, the server will become the single source of truth for game actions, logic, and data. Creators interested in Early Access to this functionality go {serverAuthorityEarlyAccessLinkStart}here{serverAuthorityEarlyAccessLinkEnd}. ({serverAuthorityEarlyAccessLinkStart}Live{serverAuthorityEarlyAccessLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}

{listItemStart}{boldStart}[New] Server authority (beta){boldEnd} - Beta of native support for Server Authority with Latency Compensation. If a Creator enables this feature, the server will become the single source of truth for game actions, logic, and data. (Early 2026){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}[New] Sample accurate playback and batch audio changes{boldEnd} - Offers sample accurate audio playback and synchronization across multiple audio API calls. This allows you to start audio playback at an exact sample time, rather than an arbitrary server/client heartbeat. This also provides the ability to ensure a set of audio property changes occur in the same frame. (Early 2026){listItemEnd}
Description.GenerativeAI2025SeptemberUpd: {listItemStart}{boldStart}Assistant scripting workflow improvements{boldEnd} - Assistant, integrated with Code Assist, delivers more accurate and productive AI scripting experience. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Enhance experiences with interactive natural language capabilities{boldEnd} - The Text Generation API opens up new interactive possibilities for your users to try in your experiences, such as NPC dialogue. This API is powered by an open-source LLM with Roblox enhancements, enabling you to implement various text-based AI features within your experiences. When you leverage this service, you can input text prompts and get text responses from the LLM. At this time, all text is limited to English only. ({introducingTextGenerationApiBetaLinkStart}Live{introducingTextGenerationApiBetaLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Cube 3D and Mesh Generation API (beta) in-experience and Assistant{boldEnd} - Mesh generation API lets your users create personalized items in-experience in real time, unlocking higher engagement. In addition, with Assistant in Studio, you can easily create a mesh and texture object in seconds with the "/generate" prompt. ({introducingTextGenerationApiBetaLinkStart}Live{introducingTextGenerationApiBetaLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}MCP Assistant{boldEnd} - Assistant integrates MCP (Model Context Protocol) as a follow to our original {openSourceMCPServerLinkStart}open source Studio MCP server{openSourceMCPServerLinkEnd} announcement earlier this year and will be able to connect to 3rd party tools and programs that are also using MCP. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Text to speech API{boldEnd} - Convert text input into speech, with a set of predefined voices. ({betaTextToSpeechApiLinkStart}Live{betaTextToSpeechApiLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Speech to text API{boldEnd} - Convert users' speech to text in real time. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}
{listItemStart}{boldStart}[New] 4D object generation{boldEnd} - Generate interactive, scripted, and textured 3D assets with prompts. (Mid 2026){listItemEnd}
Description.AvatarCreation2025SeptemberU: {listItemStart}{boldStart}Photo to avatar{boldEnd} - Create avatars from photo and text prompts using generative AI. Early Preview mobile-only ({photoToAvatarLinkStart}Live{photoToAvatarLinkEnd}), expanding to additional platforms such as desktop, console, and handheld. (Early 2026){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Avatar Auto Setup (full release){boldEnd} - Simplify and automate the creation of fully functional Roblox-ready avatars from single-mesh 3D models of humanoid-like bodies. Targeting full release. ({avatarAutoSetupProductionLinkStart}Live{avatarAutoSetupProductionLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}[New] Physically-Based Rendering (PBR) for Accessories{boldEnd} - PBR uses roughness and metalness properties to simulate how light interacts with materials, creating more realistic and visually rich assets. This enhancement allows for much higher quality accessories, enabling creators to bring more detailed and immersive visions to life. This includes all accessory types such as Hats, Face Accessories, and Back Accessories as well as Hair. ({pbrLinkStart}Live{pbrLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}[New] Emotes{boldEnd} - Creators can publish and sell custom emotes on Marketplace and inside experiences. Emotes are short animations that an avatar performs, making it easier to communicate and celebrate with others, enhancing the experience to feel more social and lively. ({emotesLinkStart}Live{emotesLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}[New] Avatar Switcher{boldEnd} - Users can change their avatars anywhere, anytime, including in experiences that support avatar switching. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Marketplace Select{boldEnd} - Marketplace Select is a new destination for premium avatar items, giving creators new ways for high quality content to get discovered. (Early 2026){listItemEnd}

{listItemStart}{boldStart}New Avatar motion and default abilities{boldEnd} - Avatars can perform a full spectrum of lifelike motion—from running and climbing to vaulting over obstacles with natural momentum, designed to be physically-based and context-aware. These behaviors will be opt-in for existing experiences. (Mid 2026){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}[New] Makeup (Studio Beta){boldEnd} - Apply makeup to different avatar heads, experiment with the new features, and creators can create their own makeup in anticipation of the full platform release. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}[New] Makeup (Full Release){boldEnd} - A new avatar asset type – creators can make lipstick, blush, eyeshadow, and pair different makeup assets to create cohesive looks, transferable across heads just like other avatar assets, and offer their looks for sale. (Early 2026){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}In-Experience Creation of Clothing & Accessories{boldEnd} - Devs can enable users to create their own custom clothing and accessories directly in-experience, then they can purchase and save to their inventory to wear across the platform. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}
Description.CloudCreation2025SeptemberUp: {listStart}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Granular collaborator permissions{boldEnd} - Give collaborators scoped access to your experiences in Team Create. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Comments and Annotations inside Studio{boldEnd} - Annotate and leave comments in Studio for your collaborators. ({collaborateWithCommentsLinkStart}Live{collaborateWithCommentsLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Scripting and Package activities in Studio Activity History{boldEnd} - View scripting ({scriptDraftCommitsLinkStart}Live{scriptDraftCommitsLinkEnd}) and Package activities from your collaborators in the Studio Activity History. (Oh hold){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Revamped Asset Manager (full release){boldEnd} - Fully launch the revamped asset manager with new features including folders and avatar assets. (Early 2026){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Notifications for comments activity in Studio{boldEnd} - Comments in Studio will soon notify other creators when they're tagged. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}One-click join for Team Create{boldEnd} - Share a link that collaborators can click to join Team Create sessions. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listEnd}
Description.PoweringMusicDiscovery2025Se: {listStart}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Expanded song charts{boldEnd} - As an extension of the “Music Experience Charts” feature, the Roblox Discover page will include top charts of popular songs. Users can open a Song Detail Page from charts, showing what experiences carry that song. ({expendSongChartsLinkStart}Live{expendSongChartsLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Licenses catalog & License Manager{boldEnd} - The Licenses catalog helps creators find and apply to make licensed use of intellectual property in their experiences. The License Manager allows verified IP owners to partner with creators through a Platform License and scan for existing experiences that might qualify for licensing. ({licensesCatalogAndManagerLinkStart}Live{licensesCatalogAndManagerLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}[New] License Manager: Self-serve IP holder onboarding{boldEnd} - An onboarding flow for eligible IP holders to apply on their own, and tools to help IP holders define and manage licenses at scale. This will include better communication tools between IP holders and creators, and improvements to how Roblox scans for IP use. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listEnd}
Description.StudioEnginePerformanceStabi: {listStart}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Explorer and Properties improvement for large places{boldEnd} - Reduce lags when using the Explorer and Properties panes in large places. (Early 2026){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Output performance for large places{boldEnd} - Improve lag when printing to Output in large places. (Live){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Improved and faster autocomplete for scripts{boldEnd} - Faster, progressive display of autocomplete and Code Assist results for scripts. (Live){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Find All/Replace All optimization{boldEnd} - Speed up finding and refactoring in Studio, eliminate a well-known hang and optimize memory usage, contributing to overall Studio Stability and usability. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}[New] Layered Clothing performance improvements{boldEnd} - Smarter fitting logic and other optimizations will ensure smoother, more efficient gameplay. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listEnd}{listEnd}
Description.RobloxHome2025SeptemberUpdat: {listStart}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Recommendation algorithm improvements{boldEnd} - Increase the transparency of our recommendation systems by providing analytics into the signals that are used in our recommendation algorithm. ({algorithmImprovementsLinkStart}Live{algorithmImprovementsLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Improved discovery of events & updates{boldEnd} - Unified way to communicate updates and events to your users. This includes a refresh of the Event creation tool in Creator Hub (rebranded as 'Events and Updates') and surfacing events more prominently on the Experience Details Page. ({captureTheHolidayRushLinkStart}Live{captureTheHolidayRushLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listEnd}
Description.PowerfulSearch2025SeptemberU: {listStart}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Dynamic filters{boldEnd} - Enable users to find your experience based on genre or tag. (On hold){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Search Landing Page (SLP){boldEnd} - Provide a search zero state to showcase recently visited experiences, as well as trending and recent searches. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Unified search result page{boldEnd} - Improve ranking of experiences for people searching on Roblox and ranking them based on their relevance to the user query regardless of content type. (Live){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Trending Events Sort{boldEnd} - Introduce a new "Trending Events" sort on Charts. ({trendingEventsSortLinkStart}Live{trendingEventsSortLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Redesigned event details modal{boldEnd} - Redesign and streamline the event details modality to offer users a better understanding of an experience event or update. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}[New] Moments APIs{boldEnd} - A new set of APIs to help creators build their own in-experience content creation, sharing, and discovery systems. These tools are designed to drive a new era of creativity, social interaction, and discovery on Roblox by enabling more moments to be captured and shared, putting users’ most exciting gameplay from your experiences directly in the hands of the community. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listEnd}
Description.Matchmaking2025SeptemberUpda: {listStart}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Custom Matchmaking{boldEnd} - Custom Matchmaking will enable you to influence matchmaking decisions and match players in a way that best suits your experience. Tune Roblox’s matchmaking algorithm and customize it with parameters relevant to your experience, optimizing how players are matched for maximum engagement. Currently in {customMatchmakingEarlyAccessLinkStart}early access{customMatchmakingEarlyAccessLinkEnd}. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listEnd}
Description.LanguageBarriers2025Septembe: {listItemStart}{boldStart}New regions (Arabic support){boldEnd} - Support Arabic across the Roblox app and for automatic translation in experiences. ({rightToLeftSupportLinkStart}Live{rightToLeftSupportLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Support for language variants{boldEnd} - Localization support for variants within languages, such as English (US) and English (UK). (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Automatic translation for experience icons & thumbnails{boldEnd} - Automatically translate text inside icons and thumbnails while matching the style and feel of the original image. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Automatic translation for in-experience images{boldEnd} - Automatically translate text within images to each user's local language while matching the original style and feel, so your experience remains authentic and seamless globally. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Real-time Text Translation API{boldEnd} - Automatic text translation API to translate UGC and dynamic content in real time. ({realTimeTranslationApiBetaLinkStart}Live{realTimeTranslationApiBetaLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Voice chat captioning and translations{boldEnd} - All users can see captions of any voice chat happening via spatial voice. Captions will go through the text filter and also be translated into users' account language if possible. (Mid 2026){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Real-time voice chat translation{boldEnd} - Real-time speech translation for voice chat. (Mid 2026){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Additional video upload language support{boldEnd} - Add additional language support to {videoUploadsBetaLinkStart}video uploads{videoUploadsBetaLinkEnd} including {spanishVideoUploadsLinkStart}Spanish{spanishVideoUploadsLinkEnd} and {videoUploadsInFiveLanguagesLinkStart}other locales{videoUploadsInFiveLanguagesLinkEnd}. (Mid 2026){listItemEnd}

{listItemStart}{boldStart}Translation glossary for Experiences{boldEnd} - Enables you to create a custom dictionary to translate experience-specific terms consistently wherever they appear. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}
Description.EmpowerCommunication2025Sept: {listStart}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Forums{boldEnd} - Forums, a dedicated space where users can share feedback, discuss gameplay, and report issues found. ({forumsLinkStart}Live{forumsLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}In-experience text chat on console{boldEnd} - Enable in-experience text chat on Xbox and PlayStation. ({experienceChatforConsoleLinkStart}Live{experienceChatforConsoleLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Party API{boldEnd} - Provides information about players who are currently in a Party together. ({partyApiLinkStart}Live{partyApiLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Community-level keyword blocklist{boldEnd} - Customizable keyword blocklist to filter unwanted words and phrases from their community. ({blockedWordsEnhancedLinkStart}Live{blockedWordsEnhancedLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Creator-driven referral{boldEnd} - Provide incentives to players for referring their friends. ({announcingTheNewFriendReferralSystemLinkStart}Live{announcingTheNewFriendReferralSystemLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listEnd}
Description.RobloxCloud2025SeptemberUpda: {listItemStart}{boldStart}Improved data stores (beta){boldEnd} - Easy-to-use schematized user profile management and platform support for session locking and retry logic. (Late 2026){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Data Stores access observability dashboard{boldEnd} - Update Data Stores Access dashboard allowing you to see usage against the new limits. ({powerfulUpdatesForDataStoresLinkStart}Live{powerfulUpdatesForDataStoresLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Data Stores Manager (beta){boldEnd} - Insights into how you are using your data stores. ({dataStoresManagerLinkStart}Live{dataStoresManagerLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Data Stores Manager (GA){boldEnd} - Improve UI and deletion in the Data Stores Manager. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Data Stores Extended Services{boldEnd} - Ability to purchase additional Data Stores storage and access request calls above the default free platform limits. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Memory Stores Extended Services{boldEnd} - Ability to purchase additional Memory Store usage above the default free platform limits. ({memoryStoresExtendedSupportLinkStart}Live{memoryStoresExtendedSupportLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Mesh Generation Extended Services and observability dashboard{boldEnd} - Ability to purchase additional Mesh Generation capacity above the default free platform limits, and an observability dashboard that lets you monitor your consumption over time. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Video Extended Services and observability dashboard{boldEnd} - Ability to purchase additional video-minutes above the default free platform limits, and an observability dashboard that lets you monitor your consumption over time. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}

{listItemStart}{boldStart}Text-to-Speech (TTS) observability dashboard and Extended Services support{boldEnd} - View, monitor, and understand your TTS requests called over time with Observability dashboards. Extended Services support enables ability to purchase additional request calls above the default free platform limits. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Badges enhancements{boldEnd} - Badges privacy options and ability to reorder. ({reorderingBadgesLinkStart}Live{reorderingBadgesLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Improved mesh LoDs{boldEnd} - Continuous improvement of LoD (Level of Detail) generation for your meshes. Optimized delivery for 3D meshes to reduce client asset download times. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}More Open Cloud APIs usable from the engine{boldEnd} - Expand the set of APIs you can use directly from game servers and plugins starting with select Groups, Inventory, and Creator Store Search APIs. (Live){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Open Cloud Developer Product and Game Pass Management APIs{boldEnd} - Open Cloud APIs with API key auth support to allow creation and management of DeveloperProducts and GamePasses, enabling you to manage your virtual economy resources with your own preferred workflow. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Try Cloud APIs in Creator Hub Docs{boldEnd} - Replace the legacy API sites' 'Try It Out' feature in Creator Hub, with expanded endpoint access and functionality. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}
Description.AccelerateCreation2025Septem: {listStart}{listItemStart}{boldStart}OpenCloud Creator Store Search API{boldEnd} - Improve Creator Store Search API on OpenCloud, replacing the legacy endpoints and adding API key auth support, allowing you to automate and integrate with search over Creator Store assets more easily. (Live){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Improved asset previews and details on Creator Store{boldEnd} - Adding support for new ways to showcase and preview different asset types on the Creator Store with features like embedded videos, interactive previews, technical details, and more. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Additional Creator Store seller analytics{boldEnd} - Better insights into your asset sales with a more detailed Store analytics dashboard. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}[New] Share custom animations through Creator Store{boldEnd} - List your own animations and find other community-made animations to use in your projects. (Early 2026){listItemEnd}{listEnd}
Description.SafetyAndModeration2025Septe: {listStart}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Moderation precision{boldEnd} - Improve precision of moderation to lessen the burden of asset moderation while keeping the community safe. (Ongoing){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Content quality moderation{boldEnd} - Improve content quality to and increase the visibility of original, non-duplicative, and non-misleading content on Roblox, and provide recommendations to creators on how to make their experiences more discoverable. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Rights Manager claims and disputes (beta){boldEnd} - Beta test of claims being sent to creators from rights holders. Creators can manage claims against others, disputes, and claims against them. ({rightsManagerLinkStart}Live{rightsManagerLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Violating scene detection{boldEnd} - AI locates bad scenes (e.g. Swastika) in UGC experiences and proactively moderates them. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Clearer moderation messages{boldEnd} - Add preview images directly into moderation messages to help you identify which asset is flagged. (Live){listItemEnd}{listEnd}
Description.EarnAndAdvertise2025Septembe: {listItemStart}{boldStart}Sell models on Creator Store{boldEnd} - Enables $USD pricing and purchasing for Creator Store models once the Asset Privacy and Permissions Open Beta is available. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Subscription promotions{boldEnd} - Enable devs to run promotions on subscriptions (e.g. free trial or discounted first month). (On hold){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Commerce in-experience via Shopify{boldEnd} - Ability to make physical products retailed via your Shopify storefronts available for users to purchase within your experience. ({shopifyIntegrationLinkStart}Live{shopifyIntegrationLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Sponsored experiences{boldEnd} - Ability to sponsor 17+ experiences and paid access experiences. ({advertisingPaidAccessLinkStart}Live{advertisingPaidAccessLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Ads Manager{boldEnd} - Improvements to ad creation (copy, edit) and ad reporting improvements. ({levelingUpAdsManagerLinkStart}Live{levelingUpAdsManagerLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Enhanced reporting in ads manager{boldEnd} - Spend and engagement metrics to ads reporting for sponsored experiences and search ads, making it easy for you to understand the effectiveness of your ads efforts. ({levelingUpAdsManagerLinkStart}Live{levelingUpAdsManagerLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Simplified ad creation flow{boldEnd} - Auto-optimize ads based on the advertiser's campaign objective and parameters, as in addition to manual ad creation. ({levelingUpAdsManagerLinkStart}Live{levelingUpAdsManagerLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Shoes{boldEnd} - Avatar creators can publish and sell Shoes on Marketplace, and users can discover these items in their own dedicated category. ({avatarShoesLinkStart}Live{avatarShoesLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}

{listItemStart}{boldStart}Schedule when avatar items go on and offsale{boldEnd} - Avatar creators can schedule when items go on and offsale. ({scheduleAvatarSaleLinkStart}Live{scheduleAvatarSaleLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Rewarded Video Ads{boldEnd} - Creators can integrate rewarded video ads into their experiences with a new API and earn revenue from advertisers buying across Roblox. ({videoAdsRewardedLinkStart}Live{videoAdsRewardedLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Creator Rewards{boldEnd} - Creator Rewards is a bonus program that lets creators who publish experiences earn directly from the engagement their content drives on the platform. Creators can earn through this program in two ways - a daily engagement reward and an audience expansion reward. ({creatorRewardsLinkStart}Live{creatorRewardsLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}[New] 8.5% DevEx increase{boldEnd} - Creators now get 8.5% cash for earned Robux through the Developer Exchange program.({devExIncreaseLinkStart}Live{devExIncreaseLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}[New] Subscriptions in Robux{boldEnd} - Subscriptions are a valuable model for engaging your most loyal fans with recurring benefits and perks. We are expanding Subscriptions within Experiences to include Subscriptions in Robux, making Subscriptions accessible to a wider audience of players. (Early 2026){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}[New] Managed Pricing{boldEnd} - Combines price testing and region-specific pricing to automatically ensure you're always offering the best price for your in-experience items. (Mid 2026){listItemEnd}
Description.LearnConnectCreate2025Septem: {listStart}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Tutorials in-Studio{boldEnd} - New Roblox-created tutorials for new and growing creators. Tutorials can be found through Studio Start and followed without leaving Studio. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Community-created guides in Creator Hub Learn{boldEnd} - Discover community-created guides in docs site search and landing page feeds. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Cross-product Creator Home{boldEnd} - Personalized experience across Creator Hub Home and Studio Start Home. Learning content recommendations, key announcements, and more will be easy to find on both surfaces. (Early 2026){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}More experience templates & sample content{boldEnd} - Release new and revamped experience templates and features for creators to reuse and build with. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}DevForum automatically translated{boldEnd} - Content on DevForum is automatically translated to Spanish, and eventually all 16 Roblox-supported languages, so you can communicate with the global creator community. ({devForumAutoTranslatedLinkStart}Live{devForumAutoTranslatedLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Read & browse full documentation in Studio{boldEnd} - Creator Hub documentation can be opened in Studio, so you can access reference, guides, and more while you build. (Early 2026){listItemEnd}{listEnd}
Description.Insight2025SeptemberUpdatePa: {listItemStart}{boldStart}Data export API{boldEnd} - Export raw analytics data for your experiences. (On hold){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Improved insights and benchmarks{boldEnd} - Improve transparency around discovery to help you take action and grow your experience. ({analyticsRecommendationsLinkStart}Live{analyticsRecommendationsLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Configs{boldEnd} - Dynamically launch new features and update in-game values without server restarts. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Update key metrics hourly{boldEnd} - Update key metrics hourly instead of daily (e.g., acquisition, economy, funnel, custom events) ({analyticsHourlyLinkStart}Live{analyticsHourlyLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Feedback Dashboard{boldEnd} - View and analyze player feedback directly on Creator Hub to identify trends and areas for improvement. ({feedbackFromYourCommunityLinkStart}Live{feedbackFromYourCommunityLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Analytics Insights{boldEnd} - View weekly and monthly reports with top metric drivers, outlier detection, and player feedback summaries. ({betaAnalyticsAssistantLinkStart}Live{betaAnalyticsAssistantLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Player feedback with ratings{boldEnd} - Players can choose share an optional comment when rating an experience. ({feedbackFromYourCommunityLinkStart}Live{feedbackFromYourCommunityLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Real-time performance analytics{boldEnd} - Compare client crash rates and other metrics in real time between the latest version of an experience and previous versions. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}

{listItemStart}{boldStart}Experience betas{boldEnd} - Test new and updated experiences with a select group of users that you choose. Because beta experiences aren’t visible in search or on the homepage, they won’t impact your rankings or discoverability when you officially launch. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Experimentation (A/B testing){boldEnd} - Run in-game and matchmaking experiments to measure causal impact from your updates. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Experience safety analytics{boldEnd} - View abuse report submitter volume and breakdowns (e.g., by category and channel) to help you keep your experiences safe. We also plan to add more safety data based on your feedback. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}[New] Experience overview improvements{boldEnd} - View retention KPIs by acquisition source and select to view similar experience or genre benchmarks on your Experience Overview page. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}
Description.Personalization2025September: {listStart}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Expanded notifications{boldEnd} - Notifications about critical events like a spike in crash rates, a collaboration invite, or a 'right to be forgotten' request. (Oh hold){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Bundled creator notifications{boldEnd} - Bundle together similar notifications in the tray on Creator Hub and Studio, making it easier to navigate. (Oh hold){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}[New] Improvements to creator notifications{boldEnd} - More personalized announcements and alerts in the notification tray for Creator Hub and Studio. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listEnd}
Description.Collaborate2025SeptemberUpda: {listItemStart}{boldStart}Groups owning Groups{boldEnd} - Set up more complicated hierarchies with your collaborators by managing groups owned by your primary group. (Early 2026){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Experience-specific permissions{boldEnd} - Configure the new granular experience permissions to specific experiences rather than all group experiences. ({grantPublishAccessLinkStart}Live{grantPublishAccessLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}External Group permissions{boldEnd} - Provide permissions for your group content to external groups, as well as your roles. (Early 2026){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Overhauled navigation{boldEnd} - Overhaul the experience-level, and top-level navigation to better highlight the right things to the right people at the right time. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Group revenue reporting{boldEnd} - Improve Transactions and revenue reporting so you can more easily manage your Group's financial reporting. (On hold){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Group-to-Group experience ownership transfer{boldEnd} - Ability to shift ownership between Groups. (Late 2025){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}Asset privacy and permissions: Privacy options for meshes, images, decals beta{boldEnd} - Opt-in beta that provides privacy settings for new Mesh, Image, and Decal assets, letting you control who has access to the asset. ({assetPrivacyAndPermissions3LinkStart}Live{assetPrivacyAndPermissions3LinkEnd}){listItemEnd}

{listItemStart}{boldStart}Asset Privacy and Permissions: Animations Sharing{boldEnd} - Share animations with friends and groups. ({assetPrivacyAndPermissionsAnimationsShareLinkStart}Late 2025{assetPrivacyAndPermissionsAnimationsShareLinkEnd}){listItemEnd}{listItemStart}{boldStart}[New] Activity Tracker alerts suspicious behaviour{boldEnd} - More robust event coverage, flagging when collaborators take suspicious activity, so you can keep your groups safer. (Mid 2026){listItemEnd}
Description.CreatorHubSearch: Search and navigate more efficiently across Creator Hub, so you can spend less time finding what you need and more time creating.
Description.CreateHoweverYouWantEarly202: {boldStart}Photo-to-Avatar APIs{boldEnd} — Generates avatars from photo and text prompts using generative AI. Early Preview mobile-only {tarapis3931624LinkStart}Live{tarapis3931624LinkEnd}. Expanding to additional platforms such as desktop, console, and handheld. (Early 2026)

{boldStart}Server Authority with Latency Compensation{boldEnd} — Native support for Server Authority with Latency Compensation. Enabling this feature makes the server the source of truth for game actions, logic, and data and enables latency compensation for responsive gameplay. (In {thority4139157LinkStart}Beta{thority4139157LinkEnd}. Full Release in Early 2026)

{boldStart}Instance streaming: Streaming excluded mode{boldEnd} — For experiences with Instance Streaming enabled, prevent replication of models to all clients. No need to hide instances under the camera or the PlayerGUI anymore! (Early 2026)

{boldStart}Input Action System{boldEnd} — Streamlines cross-platform development with a data-driven action map and visual interface for bindings. (In {riences3890979LinkStart}Beta{riences3890979LinkEnd}. Full Release in Early 2026)

{boldStart}Native Code Generation for Android{boldEnd} — Native Code Generation currently powers high-performance computing on Servers and Studio Plugins. We are extending this capability to run on Android clients, unlocking near-native execution speeds for local scripts and enabling a new class of complex, compute-heavy experiences. (Early 2026)

{boldStart}Adaptive Animation{boldEnd} — Animation retargeting system using the HumanoidRigDescription (HRD) as a universal adapter. Custom humanoid rigs can use platform animations and abilities, and animations play correctly across any rig regardless of scale, proportions, or bone structure. (In {ousrigs4116008LinkStart}Beta{ousrigs4116008LinkEnd}. Full Release in Early 2026)

{boldStart}Acoustic Simulation{boldEnd} — Automatically simulate real-world behavior of audio in your environments including occlusion, diffraction, and reverb. Includes configuration and support for Sound, AudioEmitter, and AudioListener instances. (In {ulation3634265LinkStart}Beta{ulation3634265LinkEnd}. Full Release in Early 2026)

{boldStart}MCP Assistant for 3rd party integration{boldEnd} — Assistant integrates MCP (Model Context Protocol) as a follow to our original open source Studio MCP server announcement earlier this year and will be able to connect to 3rd party tools and programs that are also using MCP. (Early 2026)
{boldStart}Revamped Asset Manager{boldEnd} — Fully launch the revamped Asset Manager with new features including folders and avatar assets. (Early 2026)
{boldStart}Detailed place version history{boldEnd} — Detailed place version history in Studio that tracks who made changes and when. (Early 2026)
{boldStart}Import Queue{boldEnd} — Add support for images, audio and video and replace bulk importer in the revamped Asset Manager. (Early 2026)

{boldStart}UI styling{boldEnd} — Applies look and feel changes to UI components globally using stylesheets. Give you the ability to update the look and feel of your UI with one click. (In {erience3901480LinkStart}Beta{erience3901480LinkEnd}. Full Release in Early 2026)
{boldStart}Avatar Switcher{boldEnd} — Users can change their avatars anywhere, anytime, including in experiences that support avatar switching. (Early 2026)
{boldStart}Studio performance tooling{boldEnd} — Tools to diagnose performance issues, including memory breakdown and more. (Early 2026)
{boldStart}Instance streaming: Frustum shape{boldEnd} — Streaming based on a frustum shape (ie a camera view) instead of radially. (Early 2026)

{boldStart}Physically-simulated characters with the ability to ragdoll death{boldEnd} — We are enabling physically-simulated character movement by introducing the AnimationConstraint instance as a replacement for Motor6D alongside configurable force and torque limits for target pose matching. This, in combination with a newly surfaced BreakJointsOnDeath property will easily enable ragdoll death. (In {racters3266099LinkStart}Beta{racters3266099LinkEnd}. Full Release in Early 2026)
{boldStart}Marketplace Select{boldEnd} — Marketplace Select is a new destination for premium avatar items, giving creators new ways for high quality content to get discovered. (Early 2026)

{boldStart}In-Experience Auto Setup{boldEnd} — Enable developers to integrate the Auto Setup APIs directly into experience, allowing users to convert 3D models into fully functional Roblox-ready avatars, clothing, and accessories. This utilizes the established Studio setup pipeline to expand user-generated creation capabilities dynamically within experience. (Early 2026)

{boldStart}Emissive masks{boldEnd} — An additional Surface Appearance map for emission. This will give you higher fidelity control over parts of your object that should glow. (In {issives4034414LinkStart}Beta{issives4034414LinkEnd}. Full Release in Early 2026)

{boldStart}4k Texture Rendering{boldEnd} — Supports up to 4k resolution on compatible client devices by using cloud transcoding, texture streaming, and Harmony. (In {ndering4141833LinkStart}Beta{ndering4141833LinkEnd}. Full Release in Early 2026)
{boldStart}DataModel isolation and script capabilities - API Updates{boldEnd} — Add new features to DataModel Isolation and Script Capabilities to ensure all APIs are covered. (Early 2026)

{boldStart}Improved mesh LoDs{boldEnd} — Continuous improvement of LoD (Level of Detail) generation for your meshes. Optimized delivery for 3D meshes to reduce client asset download times. (Early 2026)
{boldStart}Assistant scripting workflow improvements{boldEnd} — Assistant, integrated with Code Assist, delivers more accurate and productive AI scripting experience. (Early 2026)
{boldStart}glTF export{boldEnd} — Export 3D glTF files for further editing in your tool of choice. (In {ablenow3905928LinkStart}Beta{ablenow3905928LinkEnd}. Full Release in Early 2026)
{boldStart}Animation Clip Editor Importer{boldEnd} — Overhaul FBX importer to add support for glTF and improve performance and reliability. (Early 2026)

{boldStart}CSG on meshes{boldEnd} — Perform CSG (Constructive Solid Geometry) operations like Union, Intersect and Subtract on Meshes in Studio and in-experience. This will bring us one step closer to unifying all Digital Matter on the platform by bringing Parts and Meshes closer together. (Early 2026)
{boldStart}Individually Rounded Corners{boldEnd} — Configure each corner radius of your UICorner individually. (Early 2026)
{boldStart}Speech to text API{boldEnd} — Convert users' speech to text in real time. (In {textapi4044579LinkStart}Beta{textapi4044579LinkEnd}. Full Release in Early 2026)

{boldStart}Reimport{boldEnd} — Enable one-click, non-destructive updates from external files.
Beta releases to support animations, accessories and makeup. Fully launch Reimport. (In {content4068650LinkStart}Beta{content4068650LinkEnd}. Full Release in Early 2026)

{boldStart}Avatar Makeup{boldEnd} — A new avatar asset type – creators can make lipstick, blush, eyeshadow, and pair different makeup assets to create cohesive looks, transferable across heads just like other avatar assets, and offer their looks for sale. (In {rmakeup3973764LinkStart}Beta{rmakeup3973764LinkEnd}. Full Release in Early 2026)

{boldStart}Studio Luau file sync{boldEnd} — Enhances script sync for large codebases (folder sync) using language server features and external code editors. (In {inbeta40654681LinkStart}Beta{inbeta40654681LinkEnd}. Full Release in Early 2026)
Description.CreateHoweverYouWantLate2025: {boldStart}Text to speech API{boldEnd} — Convert text input into speech, with a set of predefined voices. ({release3986607LinkStart}Live{release3986607LinkEnd})

{boldStart}License Manager: Self-serve IP holder onboarding{boldEnd} — An onboarding flow for eligible IP holders to apply on their own, and tools to help IP holders define and manage licenses at scale. This will include better communication tools between IP holders and creators, and improvements to how Roblox scans for IP use. ({ngforipholdersLinkStart}Live{ngforipholdersLinkEnd})

{boldStart}Find All/Replace All Optimization{boldEnd} — Speed up finding and refactoring in Studio, eliminating hang, optimizing memory usage, and contributing to overall Studio stability and usability. ({refresh3930326LinkStart}Live{refresh3930326LinkEnd})
{boldStart}Updated Luau type solver{boldEnd} — Improve type inference with more accurate autocompletion and more. ({esolver4084991LinkStart}Live{esolver4084991LinkEnd})

{boldStart}Avatar Auto Setup updates{boldEnd} — Additional capabilities to simplify and automate the creation of fully functional Roblox-ready avatars from single-mesh 3D models of humanoid-like bodies. Feature updates include joint placement control and user-guided setups so creators can use partially built avatars. ({ingonly3972721LinkStart}Live{ingonly3972721LinkEnd})
{boldStart}DragDetectors for UI{boldEnd} — Make UI in your experience draggable and interactive without scripting. ({eleased3109263LinkStart}Live{eleased3109263LinkEnd})
{boldStart}Range limit for lights{boldEnd} — Increase the range limit for lights to 120 studs. ({itto1203954367LinkStart}Live{itto1203954367LinkEnd})

{boldStart}In-Experience Creation of Clothing & Accessories{boldEnd} — Allows creators to publish experiences where users can create and purchase custom clothing and accessories in-experience that they can save to their inventory to wear across the platform. ({lothing4037419LinkStart}Live{lothing4037419LinkEnd})

{boldStart}Layered Clothing performance improvements{boldEnd} — Smarter fitting logic and other optimizations will ensure smoother, more efficient gameplay. ({formant4147160LinkStart}Live{formant4147160LinkEnd})

{boldStart}Expanded song charts{boldEnd} — As an extension of the “Music Experience Charts” feature, the Roblox Discover page will include top charts of popular songs. Users can open a Song Detail Page from charts, showing what experiences carry that song. ({nroblox3301659LinkStart}Live{nroblox3301659LinkEnd})

{boldStart}Scalable Lightweight Interactive Models (SLIM) v1{boldEnd} — Automatically composites models and renders LoDs to reduce triangle counts, improve performance across devices, and let creators build bigger, more detailed experiences without sacrificing performance. ({elsslim4034709LinkStart}Live{elsslim4034709LinkEnd})

{boldStart}ViewportDisplaySize API{boldEnd} — Queries screen size categories to help build universal UIs that adapt to different form factors. This brings us closer to creators developing universally, where they build UI/UX for different inputs & form factors rather than specific platforms. ({sizeapi3880384LinkStart}Live{sizeapi3880384LinkEnd})

{boldStart}UIStroke improvements: scaling, offsets, and more{boldEnd} — Improvements to UIStroke, including supporting scaling thickness, custom border alignment, and unlimited strokes. ({andmore3958036LinkStart}Live{andmore3958036LinkEnd})

{boldStart}Texture Streaming{boldEnd} — Texture streaming gives you the freedom to add more texture variety and detail to your experiences without having to worry about scaling across all devices. It does this by rapidly loading baseline quality textures first in order of importance and then increases quality of textures up to the available memory on the device. ({reaming4141446LinkStart}Live{reaming4141446LinkEnd})

{boldStart}API Key Management updates{boldEnd} — Provides an improved interface for teams to manage scopes, wildcards, and keys on the Creator Hub. ({vements4009194LinkStart}Live{vements4009194LinkEnd})
{boldStart}Windows handheld emulator{boldEnd} — Simulates input, UI, and performance on Windows handheld devices directly within Studio. ({nsforanydeviceLinkStart}Live{nsforanydeviceLinkEnd})
Description.CreateHoweverYouWantMid2025U: {boldStart}Physically-Based Rendering (PBR) for Accessories{boldEnd} — PBR uses roughness and metalness properties to simulate how light interacts with materials, creating more realistic and visually rich assets. This enhancement allows for much higher quality accessories, enabling creators to bring more detailed and immersive visions to life. This includes all accessory types such as Hats, Face Accessories, and Back Accessories as well as Hair. ({ssories3816937LinkStart}Live{ssories3816937LinkEnd})

{boldStart}Instance Streaming: Multi Replication Focus{boldEnd} — For experiences with Instance Streaming enabled, this designates multiple areas for streaming and simulation to ensure critical regions never stream out. ({ionfoci3848736LinkStart}Live{ionfoci3848736LinkEnd})

{boldStart}Licenses catalog & License Manager{boldEnd} — The Licenses catalog helps creators find and apply to make licensed use of intellectual property in their experiences. The License Manager allows verified IP owners to partner with creators through a Platform License and scan for existing experiences that might qualify for licensing. ({erships3816457LinkStart}Live{erships3816457LinkEnd})

{boldStart}Explorer revamp{boldEnd} — Significantly improve performance of the Explorer widget, especially in large, complex places. Introduce better organizational and editing tools to make quick changes directly from the explorer, increasing creator velocity. ({lledout3774759LinkStart}Live{lledout3774759LinkEnd})

{boldStart}Improvements to Gamepad Directional UI Selection{boldEnd} — Major improvements to default Gamepad Directional UI Selection so players can navigate all UIs using a Gamepad without developer lift. ({gamepad3864317LinkStart}Live{gamepad3864317LinkEnd})

{boldStart}Haptics 2.0{boldEnd} — Haptics 2.0 enhances the haptic feedback experience by implementing effect-based haptics, providing improved haptic effects out of the box, and enabling you to create custom waveforms. ({erience3660577LinkStart}Live{erience3660577LinkEnd})

{boldStart}Avatar Settings{boldEnd} — Enhanced controls for player avatar size, collision, clothing and accessories to balance player identity with consistency and fairness in your experience. ({players3828640LinkStart}Live{players3828640LinkEnd})

{boldStart}Emotes{boldEnd} — Creators can publish and sell custom emotes on Marketplace and inside experiences. Emotes are short animations that an avatar performs, making it easier to communicate and celebrate with others, enhancing the experience to feel more social and lively. ({etplace3866987LinkStart}Live{etplace3866987LinkEnd})

{boldStart}PreferredInput API and Improved Touch Capabilities{boldEnd} — Exposes the player's primary input type (gamepad, touch, keyboard) to help adapt UI behavior making it easy to build cross-platform input behavior. Whether they’re on a gamepad, touchscreen, or keyboard, PreferredInput is your new go-to for handling button prompts and input labels, UI modes, and device-specific interactions. ({ilities3750890LinkStart}Live{ilities3750890LinkEnd})
Description.CreateHoweverYouWantMid2026U: {boldStart}Improvements to fluid dynamics{boldEnd} — Extend existing aerodynamic fluid modeling to better simulate hydrodynamic forces. (Mid 2026)

{boldStart}New Avatar motion and default abilities{boldEnd} — Avatars can perform a full spectrum of lifelike motion from running and climbing to vaulting over obstacles with natural momentum, designed to be physically-based and context-aware. These behaviors will be opt-in for existing experiences. (Mid 2026)

{boldStart}Advanced Video API{boldEnd} — New video instances and APIs that intersect with and build off of the advanced Audio API. This provides more control over how videos can be used and displayed in-experience. (In {andmore3972775LinkStart}Beta{andmore3972775LinkEnd}. Full Release in Mid 2026)

{boldStart}Improved debuggability of the Physics system{boldEnd} — Improve the ability to debug physics in Studio by overhauling the pause/step functionality in Studio ({physics3094522LinkStart}Live{physics3094522LinkEnd}), adding the ability to temporarily simulate selected parts in edit mode ({uginapi3093140LinkStart}Live{uginapi3093140LinkEnd}), and visualizing force/torques (Coming). (Full Release in Mid 2026)
{boldStart}Styling transitions{boldEnd} — Add animated transitions to your UI through the Styling system. (Mid 2026)
{boldStart}Improved physics solver{boldEnd} — New and improved physics solver that enables more complex mechanisms and makes existing mechanisms more robust. (Mid 2026)

{boldStart}Animation Graphs{boldEnd} — Node-based graph editor for motion compositing. Build blend trees and control speed matching, directional blending, and body masking without code, enabling responsive character motion. (Mid 2026)

{boldStart}Animation Reimport{boldEnd} — The Animation Reimport feature is designed to give creators a simple, fast, and non-destructive way to update animation clips in Roblox Studio from their original external source files (like FBX/GLTF). (Mid 2026)

{boldStart}4D functional object generation{boldEnd} — Generate interactive, scripted, and textured 3D assets with prompts. (In {eration4050893LinkStart}Early Access{eration4050893LinkEnd}. Full Release in Mid 2026)
{boldStart}Scalable Lightweight Interactive Models (SLIM) v2{boldEnd} — Ongoing tuning and optimization of SLIM v1 and Avatar support. (Mid 2026)

{boldStart}Properties revamp{boldEnd} — Make editing of high-touch properties fast and fluid, and reorganize the properties panel to make interacting with it as quick and easy as possible. Significantly improve performance and stability of the properties panel, so working with it in large, complex places doesn't slow you down. (Mid 2026)

{boldStart}Text Generation API{boldEnd} — Generates text responses from a Roblox-optimized LLM for features like NPC dialogue. This API is powered by an open-source LLM with Roblox enhancements, enabling you to implement various text-based AI features within your experiences. (English only). (In {gaccess3942209LinkStart}Beta{gaccess3942209LinkEnd}. Full Release in Mid 2026)
{boldStart}Enhanced voxel terrain{boldEnd} — Significantly increase the size of experiences, lower memory/storage requirements, and enhance mesh rendering for higher visual quality. (Mid 2026)

{boldStart}Studio device simulator{boldEnd} — Overhauling the emulator to be a simulator that visualizes how experiences look, function, and perform on specific hardware within Studio. We will provide more ways to help creators understand how their experience performs on specific devices without needing to leave Studio, making it easier to see and push content boundaries on all platforms. (Mid 2026)

{boldStart}Freecam upgrades{boldEnd} — This update will enhance our Freecam feature, which enables in-experience camera free-roam for spectating and cinematic video production. Specifically, it will provide more control over camera movement, speed, and visual effects, enabling smooth and dynamic shots. (Mid 2026)
{boldStart}Dragger improvements{boldEnd} — Improved controls, guides, and measurements for draggers. (Mid 2026)

{boldStart}Sample accurate playback and batch audio changes{boldEnd} — Offers sample accurate audio playback and synchronization across multiple audio API calls. This allows you to start audio playback at an exact sample time, rather than an arbitrary server/client heartbeat. This also provides the ability to ensure a set of audio property changes occur in the same frame. (Mid 2026)
